title.en: VOID-3: Echoes of the Cosmic Deep

description.ko: 빛과 시간이 천체의 영원한 심연 속으로 녹아드는 우주의 가장 먼 곳을 시각적으로 탐구한 작품입니다.
description.en: A visual exploration into the furthest reaches of the universe, where light and time dissolve into the eternal silence of the celestial abyss.

prompt: Cinematic wide shot of a massive gravitational singularity at the center of the VOID-3 sector, surrounded by swirling iridescent nebulae and crystalline star dust, deep obsidian and violet color palette, bioluminescent energy tendrils stretching across the vacuum, hyper-realistic, 8k resolution, ethereal lighting, sense of infinite cosmic scale.
